deals.Description: San Francisco- and Singapore-based startup building search infrastructure for AI agents.
deals.Investors: Square Peg, Argor, leading AI scientists

deals.Description: Provider of modular and prefabricated data center infrastructure. Specializes in modular data centre solutions that integrate power, IT, and cooling systems, supporting global deployment of AI data centre infrastructure.
deals.Investors: Decarbonization Partners (a joint venture between BlackRock and Temasek), Alibaba Cloud, other strategic investors

deals.Description: An AI-native commercial insurance brokerage that automates workflows for small and mid-market businesses, streamlining tasks like policy comparison and submissions across carrier portals.
deals.Investors: Peak XV Partners, Intact Private Capital

deals.Description: Provider of an agentic edge network built natively for agentic AI services.
SaaS company whose flagship product, VWO (Visual Website Optimizer), helps over 3,000 global brands optimize digital experiences and drive business growth.
deals.Investors: Everstone Capital (Singapore-headquartered, lead), Vyom Mankekar, Shivanand Mankekar, Jt. Laxmi Mankekar, Kedar Mankekar, Sparsh Gupta (CEO), others

deals.Description: Creator of agentic AI for production operations, redefining production operations by replacing reactive, manual workflows with an autonomous production ops agent.
deals.Round: Undisclosed (oversubscribed funding round, likely Series A or above)
deals.Investors: Xora Innovation, Mayfield, StepStone Group, Prosperity7 Ventures, M12 (Microsoft's venture fund)

deals.Description: AI company building industrial intelligence systems that reads data from industrial machines in real time, converting raw telemetry into ranked, confidence-scored operational insights.
Developing an AI-powered messaging platform designed to streamline communication and data management for construction and facilities management teams.
deals.Investors: Tin Men Capital, Alter Global, Hustle Fund, Gondor Capital

deals.Description: AI healthcare firm advancing DeepHealthVision (DHV) technology, a contactless health monitoring system using remote photoplethysmography and AI.
deals.Investors: Catalytic Capital for Climate and Health (C3H) (backed by Temasek Trust), Richardson Family office

deals.Description: AI technology company focused on generative AI, vertical AI models, and agentic AI, expanding its Singapore-based AI Research & Application Center (ARAC).
deals.Investors: EDBI (investment arm of SG Growth Capital), Asia Partners, SMDV, CMLIM Capital
deals.Founders: Korawad Chearavanont, Keng Teik Koay, Touchapon Kraisingkorn

deals.Description: Cloud infrastructure company focused on building GPU compute platforms and AI data centres across the Asia-Pacific region.
deals.Investors: Greenoaks, RTP Global, Unicorn India Ventures

deals.Description: A global R&D hub in Singapore focused on embedding AI across game and film production workflows. It specializes in AI-Generated Content (AIGC) and Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) for content creation, transitioning to an open Media as a Service (MaaS) and Platform as a Service (PaaS) model for recurring SaaS revenue.

Biobot Surgical develops advanced robotic systems for medical applications, enhancing precision and outcomes in surgical procedures. The company focuses on integrating cutting-edge technology to revolutionize healthcare delivery.
Libeara is a technology company operating in the financial sector, likely leveraging blockchain or data-driven solutions. It aims to innovate financial services through its platform.

Provides an AI platform focused on delivery and administrative operations, offering AI-powered accounting and infrastructure tools. Proceeds are earmarked for operational expansion and product development.
Institutional-grade quantitative AI trading platform. The platform is preparing for a public launch, moving out of invitation-based whitelist only mode.
deals.Investors: Joffre Capital, Huashan Capital, Asia-based quantitative trading consortium

deals.Description: OrtCloud is building specialized cloud infrastructure for artificial intelligence workloads. The platform focuses on creating systems that can handle fixed workloads and AI agent-based applications.
DayOne is a Singapore-based data center company. It provides essential infrastructure for data storage and processing.
